name: Wireless Noise‑Canceling Headphones
shortDesc: Over‑ear wireless headphones with 30‑hour battery life and touch controls.
desc: Enjoy premium sound with cutting-edge noise-cancelation technology. Comfortable, lightweight, and wireless.

name: Smart Fitness Watch
shortDesc: Smartwatch with heart‑rate monitor, GPS, sleep tracking, and 7‑day battery.
desc: Track steps, calories, sleep, and keep connected on the go. Waterproof and comfortable for daily wear.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
shortDesc: Water‑resistant Bluetooth speaker with 12‑hour playback.
desc: Compact, powerful sound, ideal for indoors and outdoors. Splash-proof and portable.

name: Adjustable Laptop Stand
shortDesc: Ergonomic laptop stand with adjustable height and sturdy aluminum build.
desc: Helps with posture and cooling. Suitable for most laptops. Easily portable.

name: Wireless Optical Mouse
shortDesc: Compact wireless mouse with smooth tracking and 12‑month battery life.
desc: Plug-and-play, comfortable for all hand sizes, works on most surfaces.

name: Rugged Shock‑Proof Phone Case
shortDesc: Heavy-duty protective case with drop protection and raised edges.
desc: Fits major phone brands. Military-grade drop tested. Variety of colors.

name: 20000mAh Power Bank
shortDesc: High‑capacity USB‑C power bank with fast charging and 3‑port output.
desc: Charge phones and tablets multiple times on a single charge.

name: 1080p HD Webcam
shortDesc: Full‑HD webcam with built‑in microphone and auto‑focus.
desc: Ideal for remote work, video calls, and live streams. Plug-and-play via USB.

name: RGB Mechanical Keyboard
shortDesc: Mechanical gaming keyboard with RGB backlight and programmable keys.
desc: Satisfying tactile feel. Customizable lighting and macros. Designed for gamers and typists.

name: LED Desk Lamp with USB Port
shortDesc: Adjustable LED desk lamp with 3‑level brightness and USB charging port.
desc: Modern design, eye protection light, perfect for reading or working late.

name: 10W Wireless Charging Pad
shortDesc: Qi‑compatible charging pad for smartphones and earbuds.
desc: Fast, safe charging. Sleek design suitable for any desk or nightstand.

name: Wi‑Fi Smart Plug
shortDesc: Remote‑controlled outlet plug for lamps or appliances via app.
desc: Set schedules, control from anywhere, voice assistant compatible.

name: True Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds
shortDesc: Compact earbuds with 24‑hour battery case.
desc: Touch controls, sweat-resistant, fits securely for workouts or commutes.

name: Large Gaming Mouse Pad
shortDesc: Extra‑large mouse pad with non‑slip base and RGB accents.
desc: Never run out of room while gaming or editing. Washable surface.

name: 7‑Port USB 3.0 Hub
shortDesc: High‑speed USB‑C powered hub with 7 USB 3.0 ports.
desc: Expand connectivity for any laptop or PC. Over-current protection.

name: HD Mini Portable Projector
shortDesc: Compact HD projector with HDMI and built‑in speaker.
desc: Broadcast movies, presentations anywhere. Easy setup.

name: Wi‑Fi 6 Dual‑Band Router
shortDesc: Wi‑Fi 6 router with beamforming and 4x antennas.
desc: Fast, broad wireless coverage for home or office. Supports dozens of devices.

name: 2TB External SSD
shortDesc: Portable SSD with USB‑C and 500MB/s speeds.
desc: Compact, durable, and reliable way to store or backup all your important files.

name: Ergonomic Gaming Chair
shortDesc: Contoured chair with lumbar support and adjustable armrests.
desc: Game or work longer with comfort. Tilt, recline, and customize your seat.

name: Indoor Wi‑Fi Security Camera
shortDesc: Indoor 1080p camera with night vision and app streaming.
desc: Keep an eye on your home from anywhere via mobile alerts and recordings.
